agent: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 Sentiment Analysis Agent (cron)
election_milestone: CAMPAIGN PERIOD DAY 2 DAWN (Nomination Day 18 Jul 2026 closed; Day-2 19 Jul ~07:10 MYT first new content after 4 zero-delta overnight passes). Polling 1 Aug 2026; early voting 28 Jul; BN manifesto 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).

priority_directive.critical_flag_directive: Flag any CRITICAL sentiment shift related to PIR-06 (PN-removal-of-Bersatu).
priority_directive.shift_threshold: Flag any entity with sharp sentiment shift (>30% change from previous cycle).

priority_tagged_entities_rev7_delta.note: Some entities carry multiple PIR tags. The rev7 delta is weighted toward PIR-07 ENRICHMENT (5-hot-seats battleground map + 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes / 3-coalition strategy) and PIR-06 CORROBORATION (NST 'crossroads' analytical frame + the 7-clash empirical schism confirmation, which is PIR-06+07). No new PIR-09 content this cycle. 3 of 3 new entities are PIR-priority-tagged. The 220325 4th zero-delta pass added no priority content.

trends.overall_rev7: PH-FAVORABLE TILT HOLDS AND CONSOLIDATES; PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED (corroboration/enrichment, not new escalation). The 231029 cycle is the FIRST genuinely-new-content cycle after 4 consecutive zero-delta overnight passes (182751/194028/205755/220325). The dominant development is a PIR-07 ENRICHMENT (the cycle's main yield): Utusan 'Lima kerusi panas jadi tumpuan' (full text) names 5 hot seats with FULL candidate matchups + 2023 margins, and Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' (full text) confirms 3-coalition strategy + 103 candidates + exact seat structure (11 two / 21 three / 2 four / 2 five-cornered). PIR-06 is CORROBORATED/ENRICHED (not escalated): NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' (headline only, full text deferred) + empirical 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes (strongest tangible schism evidence to date, NOT a formal MT notice). mStar Aminuddin-Linggi reinforces Aminuddin (0.61→0.62). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice — formal_removal_notice_detected=false across now 5 consecutive passes since 170837. No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold (largest: Aminuddin +1.64%). No direction flips. NO NEW critical qualitative shift — the PIR-06 CRITICAL flag carries forward from rev5 (escalation rev4→rev5; rev5→rev6 consolidation; rev6→rev7 corroboration/enrichment). Entity layer UNCHANGED (entities_211155 zero-delta confirmation build).

PIR-06.directive: Sentiment around PN-Bersatu relationship (removal, expulsion, withdrawal narratives)
PIR-06.critical_flag_status: ACTIVE / CARRIED from rev5 (via rev6). The rev6→rev7 transition is CORROBORATION/ENRICHMENT, not a new critical shift. The two-sided/three-sided principal-level motion holds at the rev6 consolidated tier; the 231029 Day-2 content corroborates it (NST 'crossroads' + empirical 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes) without crossing into formal notice.
PIR-06.assessment: CORROBORATED/ENRICHED at the rev6 consolidated tier (no new escalation). The 231029 Day-2 dawn cycle (FIRST new-content cycle after 4 zero-delta overnight passes) adds two corroborating PIR-06 items: (a) NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' (07:00 MYT 19 Jul) — mainstream 'crossroads' analytical framing (headline only, full text deferred, gnews encrypted); corroborates the Muhyiddin exit-positioning thesis and the KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' master-narrative; (b) Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' full text — empirical ballot-level confirmation that Bersatu (still a PN component) contests 24 DUN under its OWN logo (first time) and CLASHES WITH PN CANDIDATES IN 7 SEATS — the strongest tangible on-the-ground schism evidence to date, but NOT a formal MT removal notice. The 7 direct Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats refine the earlier '8 Tier-4' count; named so far: Sikamat, Ampangan, Paroi (4 further pending full 36-seat cross-check). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice — formal_removal_notice_detected=false, precursor_items_count=0 across now 5 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029). No Bersatu candidate withdrawals. Trajectory UNCHANGED — most likely near-term outcome Bersatu voluntary realignment/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll; reactive PN-MT removal remains possible. Maximally favourable to PH.

PIR-07.directive: Sentiment around battleground seats (campaign momentum, candidate reception)
PIR-07.assessment: PIR-07 SUBSTANTIALLY ENRICHED this revision (the 231029 cycle's main yield). First structured Day-2 battleground mapping: Utusan 'Lima kerusi panas jadi tumpuan' (full text) names 5 hot seats with FULL candidate matchups + 2023 margins — Linggi (Aminuddin/PH-MB vs Datuk Mohd. Faizal Ramli/BN-incumbent vs Datuk Zamri Md. Yunus/Bersatu; 2023 Faizal beat Zamri-PN by 1,461; 'risiko besar' for Aminuddin), Sikamat (Nor Azman/PH vs Datuk Tun Faisal Ismail Aziz/Bersatu-info-chief vs Datuk Razali Abu Samah/PN; Aminuddin's old seat), Ampangan N.14 (Datuk Nazri Kassim/PH-new-PKR-NS-dep-chief vs Datuk Dr. Mohamad Rafie Ab. Malek/PN-former-ADUN vs Noor'azah Harun/Bersatu; 2023 margin 329), Paroi (Kamarol Ridzuan Mohd. Zin/PN-incumbent-largest-electorate vs Ahmad Shahir Mohd. Shah/PH-Amanah-Youth-sec-gen vs Mohd. Nazree Mohd. Yunus/Bersatu), Labu (Mohamad Hanifah Abu Baker/Bersatu-incumbent vs Datuk Ahmad Faez Abdul Razak/PH vs Siti Umaira Hasim/BN). Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' (full text) confirms 3-coalition strategy + 103 candidates + exact seat structure (11 two / 21 three / 2 four / 2 five-cornered) + 94 men/9 women + youngest 23 Leevineshwaraan (Bersatu)/oldest 70 Abd.Latif (PH) + campaign to 11:59pm 31 Jul + 36 PP-KPR + 2,373 PDRM + no incidents. mStar Aminuddin-Linggi (full text) reinforces Aminuddin (0.61→0.62). No new Day-2 campaign EVENTS or poll/forecast publications beyond the mapping (daytime MYT events begin ~09:00+). 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); exact structure 11/21/2/2; 2 five-cornered (N.10 Nilai, N.33 Sri Tanjung) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).

verdict: CAMPAIGN DAY-2 DAWN ENRICHMENT (07:21 MYT 19 Jul) — PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED FORWARD (corroboration/enrichment, not new escalation). The 231029 cycle is the FIRST genuinely-new-content cycle after 4 consecutive zero-delta overnight passes (182751/194028/205755/220325). The dominant development is a PIR-07 ENRICHMENT (the cycle's main yield): Utusan 'Lima kerusi panas jadi tumpuan' (full text) names 5 hot/battleground seats with FULL candidate matchups + 2023 margins (Linggi/Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu), and Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' (full text) confirms the 3-coalition strategy + 103 candidates + exact seat structure (11 two / 21 three / 2 four / 2 five-cornered) + Bersatu contests 24 DUN under its OWN logo (first time) and CLASHES WITH PN CANDIDATES IN 7 SEATS (the strongest tangible on-the-ground schism evidence to date, NOT a formal MT removal notice). mStar 'Aminuddin yakin langkah ke Linggi mampu tambah kemenangan PH' (full text) reinforces Aminuddin (0.61→0.62, +1.64%). The PIR-06 axis is CORROBORATED/ENRICHED (not escalated): NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' (07:00 MYT 19 Jul, headline only, full text deferred — gnews encrypted) adds a mainstream 'crossroads' analytical framing corroborating the Muhyiddin exit-positioning thesis and the KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' master-narrative. The motion remains THREE-SIDED (PN-MT-may-remove / Bersatu-may-exit / PAS-sidelining). NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued — formal_removal_notice_detected=false, precursor_items_count=0 across now 5 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029). CAVEAT: the Annuar Musa 'part-ways' speaker-label is ambiguous (known Bersatu Sec-Gen is Hamzah Zainudin) — retained with reduced confidence (0.70); does not change the two-sided assessment (Muhyiddin's exit-hint is independently corroborated).
